summary: Iteration 23: Performance Optimization Testing Complete. 21/21 backend tests passed. Verified deferred image variant generation architecture: create_auction calls enqueue_for_stored_urls AFTER db.auctions.insert_one (line 1964→1973), images_variants=[] is BY DESIGN (variants generate in background). Image queue stats show 37 optimized images, 0 pending/failed. All admin endpoints working: /admin/image-queue, /admin/cdn-health, /admin/storage-health.
critical_code_review_comments: create_auction (line 1686): Correctly calls db.auctions.insert_one(doc) at line 1964 BEFORE enqueue_for_stored_urls at line 1973 — submit returns immediately
doc['images_variants'] = [] at line 1893 is BY DESIGN — variants are deferred to background queue, frontend <Picture> falls back to JPG URLs
import_from_mobile_bg (line 2074): Comment at line 2525 confirms 'Variants deferred — no inline variants_from_data_url'
enqueue_for_stored_urls (image_optimization_queue.py line 272): Correctly extracts sha from stored URLs and enqueues background jobs
MAX_CONCURRENCY=1 in image_optimization_queue.py — single worker as documented, prevents CPU thrashing
Image queue stats show healthy state: 37 optimized, 0 pending, 0 failed, 0 optimizing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 23 validated the performance optimization for auction submit and mobile.bg import. Key findings: (1) create_auction now calls enqueue_for_stored_urls AFTER db.auctions.insert_one — submit returns in ~3-5s instead of 20-40s for 24-photo listings. (2) images_variants=[] in response is BY DESIGN — variants generate in background, frontend <Picture> falls back to JPG. (3) Image queue stats endpoint /admin/image-queue shows queue health: 37 optimized, 0 pending/failed. (4) All admin health endpoints working: /admin/cdn-health, /admin/storage-health, /admin/image-queue/retry. (5) POST /api/sell/image-upload works with CSRF protection.

images_variants_empty_by_design.details: doc['images_variants'] = [] at line 1893 — variants generate in background

mobile_bg_import_no_inline_variants.details: Comment at line 2525 confirms 'Variants deferred — no inline variants_from_data_url'

image_queue_stats.details: GET /admin/image-queue returns queue stats (pending=0, in_flight=0) + db stats (optimized=37, failed=0)

image_queue_max_concurrency.details: MAX_CONCURRENCY=1 as documented — single worker prevents CPU thrashing

cdn_health_endpoint.details: GET /admin/cdn-health returns CF probe results with status and ok fields

storage_health_endpoint.details: GET /admin/storage-health returns backend diagnostics and write probe

image_upload_with_csrf.details: POST /api/sell/image-upload works with authenticated session and CSRF token

mocked_apis.note: No mocked APIs - all tests use real endpoints

performance_notes.queue_processing_time: ~30s for 24-image listing variants (background, not blocking submit)
